title: GameHelper
description: Adds a Helper GUI to your game, allowing to simply edit gamerules, tp to death position and ...
body:
本模组在游戏中添加了一个 Helper GUI，默认通过 G 键打开，提供对游戏存在帮助的一些功能，包括：

This mod adds a Helper GUI to the game, which can be opened by default with the G key. It provides several features that assist with gameplay, including:  

* 记录死亡坐标
* 传送至死亡地点
* 修改游戏规则
* 查看 F3 + ? 调试选项

* Recording death coordinates  
* Teleporting to death locations  
* Modifying game rules  
* Accessing F3 + ? debug options  

本模组仍然在开发中，更多功能可能会在随后被加入。

This mod is still under development, and more features may be added in the future.

GitHub：<https://github.com/mangofanfan/GameHelper-MinecraftMod>

另可参阅 <https://fanfan.moe/> 查看模组的更多信息~

![Edit gamerules](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fkrg9mBj/images/7b420f6fab1fbf0d5d4660dfceacdca4cf06849c.png)
